en: Well done, Columbo. You need to slow down, Fred.
Don't be such a bore. I'm here, aren't I? Are you?
ko: 지루하게 굴지 마. 내가 여기 있잖아. 너는?

en: I don't care if you're shit-faced.
As long as you can sing.
No, John, I don't want to play it. Then I'm all for it.
ko: 아니, 존. 그거 하고 싶지 않아. 그럼 난 찬성해.

en: What's that supposed to mean? I'm tired of the bloody anthems.
ko: 그게 무슨 뜻이야? 지겨운 국가가 질렸어.

en: I want the energy in the clubs.
The bodies. I want to make people move. You mean disco? Why not? Do you mind pissing off?
ko: 사람들. 사람들을 움직이게 하고 싶어. 디스코? 왜 안 돼? 꺼져도 괜찮아?

en: I'm not pissing off. This is a band discussion.
ko: 나는 안 꺼져. 이건 밴드 토론이야.

en: Drum loops. Synthesizers. If you say so. It's not us. Us? It's not Queen. Queen is whatever I say it is.
ko: 드럼 루프. 신디사이저. 네가 원한다면. 우리랑은 상관 없어. 우리? 퀸이 아니야. 퀸은 내가 말하는 대로야.

en: Well, you can play your own bloody drums, then. Fred.
ko: 그럼 네 드럼이나 치면 돼, 프레드.

en: OK. Let's see how good a boxer you really are.
ko: 좋아. 네가 진짜 복서인지 한번 보자.

en: Roger. Take it easy. Take it easy. Take it easy. All right, Muhammad Ali. That's...
ko: 로저. 진정해. 진정해. 진정해. 좋아, 무하마드 알리. 그건...

en: That's quite a cool riff, actually. You wrote that?
ko: 꽤 멋진 리프네, 사실. 네가 쓴 거야?
